25:I[305,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/0jxk-y9t36yrp.js","/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js"],"MermaidDiagram"]
26:I[36231,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/0jxk-y9t36yrp.js","/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js"],"CodeBlock"]
27:I[88125,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/0jxk-y9t36yrp.js","/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js"],"default"]
28:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"OutletBoundary"]
29:"$Sreact.suspense"
2c:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
2e:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
6:["$","$L25",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  Q[Query] -->|embed| V[Vector Score]\n  Q -->|tokenize| T[FTS5 Score]\n  Q -->|timestamp| TM[Temporal Score]\n  V -->|weight| F[Rank Fusion]\n  T -->|weight| F\n  TM -->|weight| F\n  F -->|sort| R[Ranked Results]\n"}]
7:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Individual Scorers"}]
8:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Vector Score"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Cosine similarity between query embedding and memory embedding:"}]
a:["$","$L26",null,{"code":"vector_score = dot(query_vec, mem_vec) / (norm(query_vec) * norm(mem_vec))\n","language":"python"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Range: 0.0 (unrelated) to 1.0 (identical)"}]
c:["$","h3",null,{"children":"FTS5 Score"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"BM25 relevance score normalized to 0–1:"}]
e:["$","$L26",null,{"code":"fts_score = bm25_score / max_bm25_score_in_results\n","language":"python"}]
f:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Temporal Score"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Recency bonus decaying exponentially:"}]
11:["$","$L26",null,{"code":"temporal_score = exp(-age_hours / half_life_hours)\n","language":"python"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Default half-life: 168 hours (7 days)"}]
13:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Rank Fusion"}]
14:["$","$L26",null,{"code":"final_score = (vector_score * w_v) + \n            (fts_score * w_t) + \n            (temporal_score * w_tm) +\n            (importance_bonus * w_i)\n\n# Bonus for high-importance memories\nimportance_bonus = memory.importance * 0.1\n","language":"python"}]
15:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Custom Scoring"}]
16:["$","$L26",null,{"code":"# Override weights\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"deployment\",\n  vector_weight=0.4,\n  text_weight=0.4,\n  temporal_weight=0.1,\n  importance_weight=0.1,\n)\n\n# Custom scorer function\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"deployment\",\n  custom_scorer=my_scorer_fn,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
17:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Result Deduplication"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"When the same memory appears in multiple result sets, Mnemosyne deduplicates and keeps the highest score:"}]
19:["$","$L26",null,{"code":"# Deduplication strategy\nseen_ids = set()\nfor result in all_results:\n  if result.id not in seen_ids:\n      seen_ids.add(result.id)\n      yield result\n","language":"python"}]
1a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Re-ranking"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":"For top-k results, Mnemosyne can apply a learned re-ranker:"}]
1c:["$","$L26",null,{"code":"# Enable cross-encoder re-ranking\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"database choice\",\n  rerank=True,\n  rerank_model=\"cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2\",\n)\n","language":"python"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Re-ranking improves precision at the cost of additional latency (~50ms per result)."}]
1e:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L27",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Tuning Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Start with default weights and adjust based on your use case. If agents frequently miss exact facts, increase ",["$","code",null,{"children":"text_weight"}],". If they struggle with conceptual queries, increase ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vector_weight"}],"."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
1f:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]
